zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Sterne於1555年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可雷頓時，他的父親Charles Stearne32歲，母親Mrs. Charles Stearne27歲。他和Dorothy Plampin至少有8個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1599年5月15日在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年44歲，埋葬在英國艾可福達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Sterne于1555年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可雷頓时，他的父亲Charles Stearne32岁，母亲Mrs. Charles Stearne27岁。他和Dorothy Plampin至少有8个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1599年5月15日在英国英格兰素福爾可享年44岁，埋葬在英国艾可福達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sterne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stern
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Moshe, Aviva, Chaim, Meyer, Hyman, Pinkas, Zvi, Devorah, Dov.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German stern, German Stern ‘star’, a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn distinguished by the sign of a star, or a Jewish artificial name. It is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Sweden, and in some other European countries (compare 3 below).
English: nickname from Middle English stern(e), stirn(e), stiarne ‘severe, strict, cruel; strong, powerful’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Sterne was born in 1555, in Raydon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Charles Stearne, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Charles Stearne, was 27. He had at least 8 sons and 6 daughters with Dorothy Plampin. He died on 15 May 1599, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Fordham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Sterne est né en 1555, à Raydon, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Charles Stearne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Charles Stearne, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles avec Dorothy Plampin. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1599, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Fordham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Sterne 1555 in Raydon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles Stearne 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Charles Stearne 27. Er hatte mit Dorothy Plampin mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Mai 1599 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fordham, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Sterne è nato il nel 1555 nel Raydon, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Charles Stearne, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Charles Stearne, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie con Dorothy Plampin. Morì il 15 maggio 1599, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Fordham, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Sterneが1555年にイギリスイギリススフォルクレイドンで生まれた時，父Charles Stearneは32歳，母Mrs. Charles Stearneは27歳であった。彼はDorothy Plampinとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1599年5月15日にイギリスイギリススフォルクで44歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスフォードハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Sterne(이)가 1555년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라이던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles Stearne(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Charles Stearne(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Dorothy Plampin(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 5월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 포드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Sterne nasceu em 1555, em Raydon, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Charles Stearne, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Charles Stearne, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas com Dorothy Plampin. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1599, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Fordham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Sterne родился в 1555 г. в местности реидон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Charles Stearne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Charles Stearne, 27. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Dorothy Plampin. Он умер 15 мая 1599 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности фордхам, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Sterne nació en 1555, en Raydon, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Charles Stearne, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Charles Stearne, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas con Dorothy Plampin. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1599, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Fordham, Essex, Inglaterra.
